description: Master cache index (v4.3). L1 = per-skill, L2 = cross-skill (_shared/), L3 = project-wide (_project/). Cache keys checked on skill execution start; entries updated on completion. Health check (Phase 0) verifies integrity before cache access. Staleness via SHA256 hashes.

L1.description: Per-skill cache. Hot. Patterns and decisions from prior executions of a single skill.
L1.promotion_rule: When 2+ skills cache the same pattern, promote to L2.

L2.description: Cross-skill cache. Warm. Patterns shared across multiple skills.
L2.promotion_rule: When pattern is referenced by 5+ skills, promote to L3.

L3.description: Project-wide cache. Cold. Architectural decisions and conventions.
L3.promotion_rule: None. L3 is the top level.

lifecycle.on_skill_start_health: PHASE 0 (Health Check): Read .claude/shared/framework-health.json. If random() < probability AND hours_since(last_check) > min_interval_hours: run 5 weighted health checks (cache_staleness, cache_hit_accuracy, shared_layer_consistency, skill_routing_integrity, adapter_availability). Compute weighted score. Append result to history[]. If score < alert_threshold (0.90): STOP, alert user with failing checks and rollback options. If healthy: proceed to Phase 1 (Cache Check).
lifecycle.on_skill_start_cache: PHASE 1 (Cache Check): Check _index.json for matching task_signature. If hit, load learned_patterns and anti_patterns. Skip derivation steps covered by cache.
lifecycle.on_skill_complete_learn: PHASE 4 (Learn): Extract new patterns and anti-patterns. Write or update cache entry. Increment hit_count. Update last_hit timestamp.
lifecycle.on_source_change: Check invalidated_by SHA256 hashes. If any mismatch, mark entry stale. Re-derive on next cache hit.
lifecycle.on_skill_complete_eval: PHASE 5 (Eval): If eval definitions exist for the current task, run deterministic evals against the output. Record pass/fail counts and quality scores in case-study-monitoring.json. Failed evals become anti-patterns in L1 cache (feeds back to Phase 4). If no eval definitions exist, skip.
lifecycle.on_cross_skill_pattern: When 2+ L1 entries share a pattern, create or update L2 entry in _shared/.
lifecycle.on_project_pattern: When L2 entry is referenced by 5+ skills, create or update L3 entry in _project/.

entry_schema.speedup_instructions: string — human-readable instructions for using this cache entry

initial_state_note: Per-skill _index.json files have empty entries[] arrays in the initial state. PARTIAL (audit FW-011/FW-012): cache discovery falls back to directory scan when entries[] is empty. The arrays populate as skills cache patterns; pm-workflow and dev caches will populate fastest as they're highest-frequency. This is not a broken protocol — it's a populate-on-write design.
